approach_summary: Followed intellij-code-reference SKILL.md decision flow: semantic 'what implements/extends' question, so probed IntelliJ MCP via get_project_modules (succeeded), then search_symbol('WorkflowAuditStrategy') to locate the base class and candidate subclasses, cross-verified by search_regex for 'extends\s+WorkflowAuditStrategy\b' across **/*.java. Both queries agreed on exactly 3 direct subclasses. No fallback to rg/tags was needed.
